scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.bump:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version,fs=require('fs'),{execSync}=require('child_process'),o={stdio:'inherit'};['backend','frontend'].forEach(p=>{const f=p+'/package.json',j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f));j.version=v;fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n')});const files=['package.json','backend/package.json','frontend/package.json'];if(fs.existsSync('package-lock.json'))files.push('package-lock.json');execSync('git add '+files.join(' '),o);execSync('git commit -m '+v,o);execSync('git tag -a v'+v+' -m '+v,o);execSync('git push --follow-tags',o);"
scripts.bump:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version,fs=require('fs'),{execSync}=require('child_process'),o={stdio:'inherit'};['backend','frontend'].forEach(p=>{const f=p+'/package.json',j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f));j.version=v;fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n')});const files=['package.json','backend/package.json','frontend/package.json'];if(fs.existsSync('package-lock.json'))files.push('package-lock.json');execSync('git add '+files.join(' '),o);execSync('git commit -m '+v,o);execSync('git tag -a v'+v+' -m '+v,o);execSync('git push --follow-tags',o);"
scripts.bump:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version,fs=require('fs'),{execSync}=require('child_process'),o={stdio:'inherit'};['backend','frontend'].forEach(p=>{const f=p+'/package.json',j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f));j.version=v;fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n')});const files=['package.json','backend/package.json','frontend/package.json'];if(fs.existsSync('package-lock.json'))files.push('package-lock.json');execSync('git add '+files.join(' '),o);execSync('git commit -m '+v,o);execSync('git tag -a v'+v+' -m '+v,o);execSync('git push --follow-tags',o);"
